---
name: Input won't convert
about: A CSV you feed in produces error rows or dropped rows
title: ''
labels: conversion-error
assignees: ''
---

> Using the web app? After a failed conversion, click **Report to GitHub** — it auto-fills this report with your error rows.

**Which tool/site exported the input, and in what format?**
e.g. Moxfield, DragonShield, Manabox …

**What happened**
Which rows errored or went missing, and the error message(s) the tool showed.

**Attach the input CSV**
The actual file (or just the offending rows). Real exports are far more useful than hand-typed examples — they carry the quirks (quoting, set codes, localized names) that trip the parser.

**Card(s) involved**
Name + set + collector number of the cards on the failing rows, if you can identify them.
